title: Crosh
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Crosh''' were a kind of creature native to the worlds of the [[Kathol Republic]]. Their hides were used in [[Crosh-hide]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
